title: sGodItems
description: sGodItems adds powerful God Tier weapons, tools, and armor to Minecraft. Featuring active abilities like Lightning Strikes and Vein Mining, passive armor effects, and a stunning interactive crafting GUI. Fully configurable and perfect for SMPs!
body:
**sGodItems - Ultimate God Weapons & Armor Plugin**


sGodItems adds a collection of powerful, mythical "God Items" to your Minecraft server, complete with special abilities, passive effects, and an interactive crafting system!

Perfect for SMPs, RPG servers, or just having fun with overpowered gear.


### **🔥 Features**
- God Tier Weapons: Swords, Axes, and Maces with unique active abilities.
- God Tools: Pickaxes with 3x3 Vein Mining and ultra-fast Shovels.
- God Armor: Full Netherite sets that grant passive potion effects (Night Vision, Speed, Strength, etc.).
- Interactive GUI: Beautiful menu (/goditems) to view all items.
- Immersive Crafting: View recipes in-game and craft items with a stunning visual animation!
- Fully Configurable: Customize names, lore, cooldowns, enchantments, and crafting recipes.
- ⚔️ Abilities & Items
- Right-click your God Items to unleash their power!

### **Weapons**
- ⚡ God Sword (Zeus's Blade): Strikes lightning at your target.
- 🪓 God Axe: Cleave ability damages all enemies in a radius.
- 🔨 God Mace: Smash the ground to create a shockwave, launching enemies away.
- 💀 God Hoe (Scythe): Launches a deadly Wither Skull projectile.
- Tools
- ⛏️ God Pickaxe (Vein Miner): Mines a 3x3 area instantly! Works on walls and floors.
- 🏗️ God Shovel: Grants Haste to melt through dirt and sand.
- 🪽 Hermes' Feather: Right-click to Dash forward! Holding it grants immunity to Fall Damage.

### **Armor Passives**
Simply wear the armor to gain these effects:
 
-   ⛑️ Helmet: Night Vision & Water Breathing.
-   👕 Chestplate: Resistance & Strength.
-   👖 Leggings: Speed II.
-   🥾 Boots: Jump Boost II.
   
📜 Commands & Permissions
> - /goditems: Opens the Main Menu.
> -    Permission: **sgoditems.use**
> - /goditems give [player]: Give a specific item.
> -    Permission: **sgoditems.admin**

🛠️ Configuration
> - You can customize everything in 
> - config.yml 
> - recipes.yml

Enchantments: Supports standard Minecraft names (sharpness, fortune, protection).
Recipes: Define custom crafting shapes using standard materials.
Cooldowns: Balance the power by setting cooldowns for each ability.

📥 Installation
- Download the JAR.
- Drop it into your server's plugins folder.
- Restart the server.
- Enjoy the power of the Gods!
